Operation 'isTodayPublicHoliday' has semantic quality issues: missing_output_details. Summary is clear and action-oriented. Description explains input parameters and timezone handling well, but lacks explicit information about the response format and return value. Added clarity about the boolean return value to improve AI agent understanding of what to expect from this operation.

data.current_summary: Determines whether today is a public holiday in the specified country
data.current_description: By default, the calculation is based on the current UTC date. You may optionally provide a timezone offset to evaluate the holiday status relative to a different local timezone. This endpoint is optimized for simple command-line or automation workflows where only the HTTP status code is required.
data.description_suggestion: Determines whether today is a public holiday in the specified country. By default, the calculation is based on the current UTC date. You may optionally provide a timezone offset to evaluate the holiday status relative to a different local timezone. Returns a boolean value indicating holiday status (true if today is a public holiday, false otherwise). This endpoint is optimized for simple command-line or automation workflows.
data.reasoning: Summary is clear and action-oriented. Description explains input parameters and timezone handling well, but lacks explicit information about the response format and return value. Added clarity about the boolean return value to improve AI agent understanding of what to expect from this operation.

message: Operation 'getNextPublicHolidaysWorldwide' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_context. Summary is clear and action-oriented. Description is somewhat vague about the scope and output structure. Added clarity about the 7-day window, the comprehensive nature of the aggregation (all supported countries), and explicit information about the return value (list with country information per entry) to improve AI agent interpretability and help agents understand the global scope of this operation.

data.current_summary: Retrieve all public holidays occurring worldwide within the next 7 days
data.current_description: This global endpoint aggregates upcoming holidays across all supported countries, enabling international systems to detect near-term events.
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves all public holidays occurring worldwide within the next 7 days across all supported countries. This global endpoint aggregates upcoming holidays from all countries in the Nager.Date database, enabling international systems to detect near-term events and coordinate across multiple regions. Returns a list of public holidays with country information for each entry.
data.reasoning: Summary is clear and action-oriented. Description is somewhat vague about the scope and output structure. Added clarity about the 7-day window, the comprehensive nature of the aggregation (all supported countries), and explicit information about the return value (list with country information per entry) to improve AI agent interpretability and help agents understand the global scope of this operation.
